# seerr_backup_settings (Data Source)

Read Seerr backup settings via /api/v1/settings/backups.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the backup settings.
- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response body.
- `retention` (Number) The number of backups to retain.
- `schedule` (String) The backup schedule in cron format.
- `status_code` (Number) HTTP status code.
- `storage_path` (String) The path where backups are stored.
